ai_tips: Starting out at 14m — 4.62km ahead with 60m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔14米出发——全程4.62公里，累计爬升60米。
0.39km in — pace 6:09/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.39公里——配速6:09/公里，强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 0m of the 7m climb done, grade here 0%. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——7米总爬升已完成0米，此处坡度0%。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 21m at 0.29km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点21米，位于0.29公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -19.2% at 0.29km — you let it flow at 2:25/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：0.29公里处坡度-19.2%——你顺势加速到2:25/公里，下坡信心不错。
4.02km — late-run check: pace 6:08/km, still holding form well. 4.02公里——后程检查：配速6:08/公里，节奏保持得不错。
Finished 4.62km in 30:11 (avg 6:32/km, +60m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成4.62公里，用时30:11（平均配速6:32/公里，爬升60米）。全程稳定扎实。
